narrative:
Mayfield Village-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 627 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
